Hitomi Kariya

3/11/2020

0.0 Importing the data set

Set working directory.

0.1 Check the data set

0.2 Create a variable of survival years for the censored

The original survival years variable does not have years for those who were censored. I created a variable of survival years which includes years for both of those who were censored and those who died during the study.

0.3 Check those who were dienrolled during the study

0.4 Recoding exposure variables and confounders

1.0 Descriptive analysis for primary aim
